content.rendered:
Policy Formulation & Legislation

Representative Projects
  • Technical Assistance to AFD for Implementation of “Mobilise Your City” Program in India
  • Development of Parking Policies for the cities of Kochi, Surat, Panaji, Nagpur, Pimpri Chinchwad and Thimphu (Bhutan).
  • Drafting National Urban Transport Authority (NUTA) Bill – Government of India
  • Drafting of ‘Position Paper on Sustainable Transport in India’, Asian Development Bank
  • Drafting Passenger Transport Policy for the State of Haryana
  • Project advisor for drafting of Metro Rail Safety Certification Model, Asian Development Bank
  • Drafting of Commission of Safety (Railways and Metro Railways) Act
  • Drafting of legislation for the establishment of a UMTA for the Ahmedabad-Gandhinagar region
  • Development of Pedestrian and Parking Policy framework for Shillong, Meghalaya
  • Institutional Options Study for BRT System in Hubli-Dharwad, Karnataka for the World Bank
